basic_details.job_title: Bank of Baroda Financial Literacy Centre Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bank of Baroda (BoB) has published the Financial Literacy Centre Counselor (FLCC) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 FLCC position. Candidates within the age range of up to 64 years and holding a Graduate degree from a recognized University (postgraduate in Agriculture, Veterinary Science, Sociology, Psychology, Social Work preferred), with banking/financial experience and local language proficiency are eligible to apply offline at Bank of Baroda Official Website. The application process will be active until 25-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 64 years (subject to good health).

qualification.details: Graduate degree from recognized University. Preference for Post Graduate in Agriculture, Veterinary Science, Sociology, Psychology and Social work. Conversant with local language. Flair for teaching and computer knowledge. Sound knowledge of banking, insurance, investment, pension, law, finance, requisite communication and team building skills. Minimum 5 years of experience as an ex-banker in any Nationalized Bank/ RRB/ Pvt. Bank OR Persons having minimum 5 years of experience in banking/ with related fields, NBFCs / FIs OR Business correspondent / BC- Coordinator with minimum 5 years of experience OR Ex RSETI Director with minimum 3 years of Experience /Faculty with minimum 5 years of Experience.

salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 25,000/- per month. Reimbursement of conveyance expenses up to Rs. 5000/- per month. Conveyance criteria: Rs. 3000/- if less than 10 camps conducted per month and Rs. 5000/- if more than 10 camps per month. Halting allowance: Rs 300/- (if more than 8-hours without night stay) and Rs 600/- (if night stay). Travelling expenses: As applicable for JMG/S-I officer for training programs/outside head quarter.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bank of Baroda Financial Literacy Centre Counselor (FLCC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bank of Baroda FLCC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Financial Literacy Centre Counselor (FLCC) post is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the FLCC post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree from a recognized University. Preference will be given to those with a Post Graduate degree in specific fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Financial Literacy Centre Counselor (FLCC) position is 64 years, provided the candidate is in good health.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the FLCC position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 25,000/- per month, along with reimbursement of conveyance expenses.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Bank of Baroda FLCC post?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by sending a duly filled and signed application form with required documents to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis for the Financial Literacy Centre Counselor (FLCC) position.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is required for the FLCC role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of experience is required, either as an ex-banker or in related banking/financial fields.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Dhamtari District in Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview of shortlisted candidates.
